title: Strawberry Fields Forever
album: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band (Super Deluxe Edition)
why_this_song: Strawberry Fields Forever by The Beatles (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "'Cause I'm going to Strawberry Fields"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "'Cause I'm going to Strawberry Fields"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Nothing is real"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Strawberry Fields forever"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "It's getting hard to be someone"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Living is easy with eyes closed
It's getting hard to be someone
No one I think is in my tree
I mean it must be high or low
That is you can't, you know, tune in

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "strawberry" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "strawberry" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fields" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fields" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Beatles one question about "Strawberry Fields Forever", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Beatles sobre "Strawberry Fields Forever", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Strawberry Fields Forever" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Strawberry Fields Forever" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Strawberry Fields Forever" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Strawberry Fields Forever" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
